questionHtml:
In the circuit shown, the battery has an emf of 12 V and negligible internal resistance. Three identical resistors are connected as shown. The resistors each have a resistance of 10 Ω.

The resistor L is removed. What is the change in potential at X?

A.  Increases by 2 V

B.  Decreases by 2 V

C.  Increases by 4 V

D.  Decreases by 4 V

meta.title: In the circuit shown, the battery has an emf of 12 V and negligible internal resistance. Three identical resistors are connected as shown. The resistors each have a resistance of 1
